title: wedelia glabra
intro: Wedelia glabra, also known as the naked Wedelia or naked yellow edge, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Wedelia glabra can be taken in the form of tea, tincture, or infusion, and are often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
